operator_definition: constant diagonal vertex used only to smoke-test C_ss/C_sH/C_HH estimator plumbing
strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
does not identify the source pole with the canonical Higgs
does not set kappa_s = 1 or cos(theta) = 1
does not use H_unit, yt_ward_identity, observed targets, alpha_LM, plaquette, or u0
verdict: This certificate is intentionally unratified. It exists only to exercise the default-off source-Higgs estimator path and must be rejected by physics-evidence gates.
